name: hippocampus
description: Store and query memories via the Sacred Brain Hippocampus API.

action.description: Action to perform: create a memory, query memories, or summarize snippets.

text.description: Memory text (for create) or concatenated context (for summarize).

instructions: Call the hippocampus memory API on port 54321. Use action=create to POST /memories with user_id, text, metadata. Use action=query to GET /memories/{user_id}?query=...&limit=... . Use action=summarize to POST /summaries with texts.
